116 _39IA BED_CHR_WC_ADMSN_CD (39Ia) Transfers - Bed, chair, wheelchair: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to transfer from a bed to a chair and back, or from a bed to a wheelchair and back, or coming to a standing position if walking is the typical mode of locomotion at admission. 00 = Activity did not occur, 01
